div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the United States Representative at the United Nations (Austin)
div.p:
185. Believe US should advocate (re Herschel Johnson letters March 29 Ante, p. 446. and April 15Not found in Department of State files. to Rusk) as initial SC action on receipt MSC report due April 30See footnote 3, p. 446. (a) prompt establishment subcommittee representing all members SC, action to be pursuant item 2 S/331Summary Statement by the Secretary General of Matters of Which the Security Council is Seized and of the Stage Reached in Their Consideration, April 18, 1947; item 2 was the matter of Special Agreements Under Article 43 (IO Files). (if necessary USDel should request inclusion this item SC agenda), and
(b) direction MSC proceed urgently study Art. 43 as previously directed.

Subcommittee should review report, examine basic principles and consider further action SC should take accelerate implementation Art. 43 in accord GA Res Dec 14. It should report recommendations SC soonest.
Urge immediate informal discussion proposed action other SC members.
Further recommendations including detailed subcommittee terms of ref follow.Telegram 204 to New York, May 6, not printed.
Strongly urge USDel take necessary action earliest release MSC report.
